info.name: Cashlez POS API
info.description: Postman collection for the current Nivora/Cashlez POS service. Auth uses PSGS/midware_master. Image upload/delete uses MinIO only. Product price uses basePrice; payment_setting no longer contains tax fields.

variable.description: Base URL for /images endpoints in this service
Bearer token from /pos/auth/login or PSGS session token

request.description: Login via PSGS/midware_master. The returned PSGS token is saved into {{pos_token}}.
Upload product image to MinIO. Returns urlFull and urlThumb; save them into product imageUrl/imageThumbUrl.
Deletes the MinIO object if the URL belongs to the configured MinIO public URL.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Kopi Susu Signature",
  "productType": "SIMPLE",
  "sku": "BVR-001",
  "upc": "8991234000001",
  "imageUrl": "{{image_url}}",
  "imageThumbUrl": "{{image_thumb_url}}",
  "description": "Kopi susu dengan susu segar pilihan",
  "stockMode": "TRACK",
  "basePrice": 28000,
  "isTaxable": true,
  "taxId": 1,
  "isStock": true,
  "qty": 100,
  "categoryIds": [{{category_id}}]
}

{
  "id": {{product_id}},
  "name": "Kopi Susu Signature Updated",
  "basePrice": 30000,
  "sku": "BVR-001",
  "upc": "8991234000001",
  "imageUrl": "{{image_url}}",
  "imageThumbUrl": "{{image_thumb_url}}",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "stockMode": "TRACK",
  "isTaxable": true,
  "taxId": 1,
  "categoryIds": [{{category_id}}],
  "isActive": true,
  "isStock": true
}

request.description: Returns empty PSGS/default override list; POS no longer stores local merchant_role_permissions.

item.name: List Merchant Permission Overrides By Role

request.description: Unsupported after PSGS migration; service rejects writes to POS merchant_role_permissions.
